Enterprise security

The Flybeth
security matrix.

Our platform is engineered for the highest level of institutional trust. We employ a multi-layered security architecture to protect agency data and traveler privacy.

Multi-factor node access

Every agent login is validated through biometric or hardware-token multi-factor authentication.

Fraud detection matrix

Real-time AI monitoring of booking patterns to identify and neutralize fraudulent transactions.

Data sovereignty

Complete control over your agency data with regional hosting options and strict data residency compliance.

Encrypted GDS streams

Direct, isolated TLS-encrypted tunnels for all communication with Amadeus and Sabre clusters.

Bank-grade encryption

Every API request and database entry is protected by 256-bit AES encryption. Our nodes are hosted in Tier-IV data centers with 24/7 physical and digital monitoring.

99.99%Uptime SLA
ISO 27001Compliance
